flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Tennessee College of Applied Technology-Knoxville rose 47% between 2006 and 2009 (49.5% → 73.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Tennessee College of Applied Technology-Knoxville rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (727 → 887).
